records.speaker: Transaction documents
records.text: Signed construction baseline stated $791,456 excluding the $235,000 land component. Later materials used a $1,339,826 budget, creating a $1,104,826 construction figure after removing land.

records.speaker: Jeff / Colby / Suited lane
records.text: Record needed explaining why Bryce chose the Jeff / Colby / Suited transaction instead of the home he was already buying, including cost, value, risk, financing, and investment pitch representations.

records.speaker: Draw submission
records.text: Draw 2 requested $237,125.77. Review needed for borrower authorization, signature method, vendor support, payment proof, and any owner-paid overlap.

records.speaker: Owner payment record
records.text: Bryce paid $55,000 as an owner payment. The issue is whether this was treated as reimbursement / credit or later converted into separate owner-paid debt without reconciliation.

records.speaker: Adverse witness
records.text: Claimed Bryce wanted upgrades and a nicer home. Record response requires itemized signed change orders, owner approvals, invoices, proof of payment, and credit schedule before converting preference into financial authorization.
